     the Fermi energy is     0.2929 ev

!    total energy              =   -6197.31461636 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000004 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.05431712 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -124484.88741573 Ry
